name: Protagenic Therapeutics, Inc.\new
business: Protagenic Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company specializing in the discovery and development of therapeutics to treat stress-related neuropsychiatric and mood disorders. Its proprietary lead compound, PT00114, is a synthetic form of Teneurin Carboxy-terminal Associated Peptide (TCAP) that dampens overactive stress responses. The company targets indications such as depression, anxiety, substance abuse, and PTSD, but has no approved products and expects no revenue from sales prior to 2027.
sellsTo: patients with stress-related neuropsychiatric and mood disorders

exposures.sentence: Protagenic Therapeutic, Inc. ... are a biopharmaceutical company specializing in the discovery and development of therapeutics to treat stress-related neuropsychiatric and mood disorders.

catalysts.event: Announcement of complete results from single-dose portion of Phase I trial
catalysts.sentence: We announced the complete results of the single-dose portion of the Phase I trial, on May 22, 2024.

catalysts.event: Anticipated announcement of complete results from multiple-dose portion of Phase I trial
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that we will be able to announce the complete results of the multiple-dose portion of the Phase I trial in the second quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Anticipated announcement of first set of Phase II (efficacy) results
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that we will be able to announce our first set of Phase II (efficacy) results in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Deadline to demonstrate compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements (bid price and equity)
catalysts.sentence: For continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market, the Company has until April 28, 2025 to: (1) demonstrate compliance with Nasdaq Rules 5550(a)(2) and 5550(b)(2), (2) file a public disclosure describing any transactions undertaken by the Company to increase its equity and provide and indication of its equity following those transactions, and (3) provide the Panel with an update on its fundraising plans and updated income projections for the next 12 months.

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide market for GAD therapies was expected to reach $1.8 billion in 2023 and with an anticipated forecasted value of $4.3 billion by 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: The worldwide market for GAD therapies was expected to reach $1.8 billion in 2023 and with an anticipated forecasted value of $4.3 billion by 2033 (https://www.futuremarketinsights.com/reports/generalized-anxiety-disorder-treatment-market).

tamClaims.claim: Worldwide market for OUD therapies was valued at $3.5 billion in 2023 and projected to reach $8.4 billion by 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: The worldwide market for OUD therapies was valued at $3.5 billion in 2023 ( https://www.thebusinessresearchcompany.com/report/opioid-use-disorder-oud-global-market-report ) and projected to reach $8.4 billion by 2033 (https://www.futuremarketinsights.com/reports/opioid-use-disorder-treatment-market ).
